/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -O2 -Wall -Wextra -O2 -shared -Wl,-soname,libmymuduo.so -o libmymuduo.so CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Acceptor.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Channel.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Connector.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/CurrentThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/DefaultPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/EPollPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/EventLoop.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/EventLoopThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/EventLoopThreadPool.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/InetAddress.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Poller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Socket.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/TcpClient.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/TcpConnection.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/TcpServer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/Timestamp.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/src/net/logger.cc.o
